retry_reason: kref_put unconditionally succeeds; if the refcount reaches zero the object is released and cannot be used again. Retrying would cause a double-put.
contract_summary: Put wrapper: releases a reference on a batadv_tt_global_entry by decrementing its kref. If the reference count drops to zero, the entry is freed via the release callback batadv_tt_global_entry_release. The caller must not access the entry after this call and must not call this function more times than the number of references held. The NULL check allows safe calling with a NULL pointer (no-op).
